name: pacvue-commerce-deploy-visual
description: Visual Cursor and VS Code sidebar for Pacvue commerce test deployments.

pacvueDeploy.githubToken.markdownDescription: GitHub Personal Access Token used when GitHub CLI (`gh`) is not installed, and preferred for workflow status polling/cancel when set (more reliable on Windows). Requires `repo` and `workflow` scopes. You can also set `GITHUB_TOKEN` or `GH_TOKEN` in the environment.

pacvueDeploy.createIssueOnFailure.description: When a deploy trigger or workflow run fails, automatically create a GitHub Issue in the extension repository for agent triage.

pacvueDeploy.issueRepo.markdownDescription: GitHub repository (`owner/repo`) where deploy failure issues are created. Defaults to this extension's repository from package.json.

pacvueDeploy.notifyOnDeploySuccess.description: Show a VS Code notification when a deploy workflow run completes successfully.
